app.name: Blindvault Homeless Community Resources
app.tagline: Your documents, encrypted on your device.
about.title: About Blindvault Homeless Community Resources
about.tagline: Your documents, encrypted on your device.
about.lede: Blindvault Homeless Community Resources is a vault for people in hard situations: survivors, advocates, case workers, and anyone who needs a quiet place for documents and conversations. Files and messages are encrypted in your browser before they ever leave it. Our servers hold only ciphertext we can't read.
about.feat.e2e.title: End-to-end encrypted
about.feat.e2e.body: Your recovery phrase derives every key. We never see it. Without it, no one can decrypt your vault, not even us.
about.feat.vault.title: Private vault
about.feat.vault.body: Store IDs, court documents, medical records, and personal notes. Nothing is uploaded in the clear.
about.feat.map.title: Resource map
about.feat.map.body: Find shelters, legal aid, food banks, and clinics nearby. The map and routing run on our own servers, with no Google and no tracking.
about.feat.msgs.title: Encrypted messages
about.feat.msgs.body: Direct messages between you, advocates, and case workers, with the same encryption as the rest of the vault.
about.feat.chat.title: Community Chat AI
about.feat.chat.body: A local AI assistant for questions, document summaries, and translations. Runs on our servers; chats are never used to train outside models.
about.feat.offline.title: Works offline
about.feat.offline.body: Once installed as a web app, the public pages keep working without a connection. That covers resources, the map, and this page.
about.how.title: How it works
about.how.step1: Create a vault with a handle you choose. We generate a 12-word recovery phrase on your device.
about.how.step2: Save the phrase somewhere only you can reach: a printed card, a password manager, or a trusted person. We can't recover it for you.
about.how.step3: Sign in from any browser with your handle + phrase. Your vault decrypts locally; nothing sensitive ever crosses the network in the clear.
about.privacy.title: What we don't do
about.privacy.b1: We don't see your files, messages, or chat history in plain form.
about.privacy.b2: We don't sell, share, or feed your data to advertisers or AI training pipelines.
about.privacy.b3: We don't require an email, phone number, or real name to create a vault.
about.privacy.b4: We don't log requests for the public resource map beyond rough aggregate counts.
about.footer: Blindvault Homeless Community Resources is built and run by a small team. The code is open to read and check, and it's built for people who can't afford a leak.
login.title: Unlock your vault
login.handle.help: The name you chose when you created your vault.
login.password.help: The password you set when you created your vault. If you never set one, switch to recovery phrase.
login.phrase.help: Type each word; the right word will appear as a suggestion.
login.deriving: Setting up encryption on your device… On an older phone this can take up to a minute — please keep this page open.
login.error.unknown_handle: We don't have a vault for that handle. Check the spelling or create a new vault.
login.error.bad_phrase: The phrase doesn't match. Check each word.
login.error.bad_password: That password didn't unlock your vault. Try again or use your recovery phrase.
login.error.no_password_set: This account doesn't have a password yet. Sign in with your recovery phrase, then set a password in Settings.
login.error.network: Couldn't reach the server. You can still try again offline if you've signed in here before.
setup.title: Create a vault
setup.password.title: Set a password for everyday sign-in
setup.password.help: Pick a password to use as your day-to-day sign-in. Your 12-word recovery phrase is still required if you ever forget it, so keep the phrase somewhere safe.
setup.password.warn: The password protects a copy of your phrase stored on our servers, encrypted on this device. We never see your password.
setup.password.requirements: At least 10 characters. Longer is stronger.
setup.password.wrapping: Encrypting your phrase under the password… On an older phone this can take up to a minute — please keep this page open.
setup.handle.label: Handle
setup.handle.help: A short name only you remember. Not your real name. No email or phone needed.
setup.handle.checking: Checking if that handle is available…
setup.handle.taken: That handle is already in use. Try another.
setup.phrase.title: Write this down. We can't recover it for you.
setup.phrase.warning: This 12-word phrase IS your vault. If you lose it, your documents are gone. If someone else gets it, they can open your vault. Store it somewhere only you can reach.
setup.confirm.title: Confirm three words
setup.confirm.help: Type the words from the positions shown to confirm you saved your phrase.
setup.confirm.mismatch: That doesn't match. Check your written-down phrase.
setup.worker.title: Outreach worker enrollment (optional)
setup.worker.help: If a caseworker gave you a code, paste it here. It will share your new vault with them so they can help. You can revoke this at any time.
setup.done.title: Your vault is ready
dashboard.title: My vault
dashboard.subtitle: Encrypted on this device. The server can't read these.
dashboard.empty: No documents yet. Add one to get started.
dashboard.confirm_delete: Delete this document? It cannot be recovered.
dashboard.section.resources.stub: Shelter, food, and clinic listings will appear here once your outreach worker shares them.
dashboard.access.empty: No one has opened any of your documents yet.
dashboard.hero.title: Tell someone you need help
dashboard.hero.body: PING opens your phone's text or call app with a message already typed for a trusted contact. Nothing goes through our servers.
dashboard.empty.title: No documents stored yet
dashboard.empty.body: Identity, immunization, court papers — anything you don't want to lose. Encrypted on this device first.
print.title: Blindvault Homeless Community Resources recovery phrase
print.warning: Keep this paper somewhere only you can reach. Do NOT photograph it on a phone you share.
worker.setup.title: Outreach worker enrollment
worker.setup.handle.label: Worker handle
worker.setup.handle.help: A short identifier your colleagues will recognise. Workers and users share the same sign-in page; namespaces are kept separate so handles can overlap.
worker.setup.done.title: Enrollment complete
worker.setup.done.body: Sign in with your worker handle and recovery phrase. Users will be able to share documents with you using your handle.
worker.dash.title: Caseload
worker.dash.subtitle: Only what users explicitly share with you is visible here. The server stores ciphertext; it cannot read documents or notes.
worker.dash.mocked: Server endpoints aren't built yet, so this shows demo data. Notes you compose are encrypted and queued locally.
worker.dash.grants.h: People who have shared with you
worker.dash.grants.empty: No active grants. When a user shares a document with your handle, it will appear here.
worker.dash.detail.empty: Select a grant to see what it covers and to send a case note.
worker.dash.note.help: Notes are encrypted on this device for the user only. The server cannot read them. The user reads them when they next sign in.
worker.dash.note.subject: Subject
worker.dash.note.sent_mock: Encrypted and stored (demo; server endpoint pending).
worker.dash.note.queued: Offline. Queued locally; will send when back online.
worker.dash.audit.help: Everything you have done on this device, since you signed in. Stored locally and never sent to the server.
panic.confirm: Wipe ALL local data on this device? You will need your recovery phrase to restore.
panic.done: Local data wiped. Sign in with your handle and recovery phrase to restore.
chat.title: Messages
chat.subtitle: Encrypted on this device. The server cannot read the messages.
chat.empty: No conversations yet. Start one to say hello.
chat.empty.hint: Tap “New conversation” to message someone, or yourself if you want a private space for notes.
chat.new.self_hint: No one to add yet? You can start a private notes-to-self thread.
chat.decrypt_failed: This message can't be displayed on this device.
chat.decrypt_retry: It may decrypt after the next key rotation. If you've changed devices, re-enter your recovery phrase to restore.
chat.new.title: Start a new conversation
chat.new.not_found: No identity found with that handle.
chat.new.safety_summary: Verify safety number (optional, for high-stakes threads)
chat.new.safety_help: Read these numbers aloud to your contact, in person or over a trusted channel. If they match what they see, no one is intercepting the connection.
chat.new.worker_consent_body: This worker will see all messages in this thread from now until you revoke access.
chat.new.worker_consent_ack: I understand and want to add this worker.
settings.title: Settings
settings.lock_help: Clear the master key from this device. You'll need your recovery phrase to come back.
settings.panic_help: Erase ALL local data: documents, messages, keys, drafts. Your vault stays safe on the server; you can restore it on this or another device with your recovery phrase.
settings.password.disabled: Password sign-in is not set up. You currently sign in with your recovery phrase.
settings.password.help: Setting a password lets you unlock the vault without typing the 12-word phrase. The phrase is still your recovery, so keep it safe.
settings.password.confirm_remove: Remove password sign-in? You'll need your recovery phrase to sign in again.
settings.password.flow_help: Type your recovery phrase to confirm it's you, then choose a new password.
resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Local services in Larimer County. No account needed to browse.
resources.empty_body: Try a shorter search or clear the box to see everyone.
resources.offline_body: Check your connection and try again. Once you've loaded the list while online, it stays available even when you're offline.
net.offline: You're offline. Anything you send will be queued.
files.title: Cloud files
files.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted file storage. Names, contents, and search terms are sealed on this device before upload.
files.confirm_delete: Delete this file? It cannot be recovered.
files.viewer.unsupported: No inline preview available. Download to view.
files.zip_one_more: Pick at least one file to zip.
files.storage.label: Storage
profile.title: Profile
profile.intro: Personal information you've chosen to keep with this account. Everything on this page is sealed with your master key and stored only on this device. The server never sees plaintext.
profile.bio_placeholder: A few sentences you'd want a worker to read first.
profile.privacy_body: Wiping local data, panic-wipe, or signing out from another device will not affect this profile. Sign out + sign back in to access from somewhere else.
profile.confirm_clear: Erase every profile field on this device? The encrypted record stays in place but contains no fields after this.
notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.body: The page you asked for doesn't exist on Blindvault Homeless Community Resources. It may have moved, been renamed, or you may have typed the address by hand.
crisis.trigger.label: Need help now
crisis.trigger.aria: Get help now: hotlines and emergency message
crisis.sheet.title: Get help now
crisis.sheet.lede: If you're in immediate danger and 911 is available where you are, call 911.
crisis.sheet.hotlines.title: Crisis hotlines
crisis.sheet.emergency.title: Send emergency message
crisis.sheet.emergency.sub: Reach a vault holder without an account.
emergency.title: Emergency message
emergency.lede: Reach a registered vault holder without creating an account. Use this when you need to get a message or document to someone fast and signing up isn't an option.
emergency.callout.title: What we can and can't promise
emergency.callout.body: Your message and any file are encrypted in this browser before they leave it. We can't tell you whether the recipient has seen it. There's no read receipt, and you'll see the same confirmation whether the handle exists or not. If you're in immediate danger and your area has 911, call 911.
emergency.field.to.help: The handle the recipient uses to sign in. Case-insensitive.
emergency.field.from.placeholder: First name, phone number, or how to reach you back
emergency.field.from.help: Only the recipient sees this. We never verify it.
emergency.field.body.placeholder: What do you want them to know?
emergency.field.file.help: Max {kb} KB. Image, PDF, or plain text.
emergency.field.file.too_big: Attachment is over the {kb} KB limit. Pick a smaller file.
emergency.sent: Message queued. The recipient will see it next time they sign in.
emergency.err.no_body: Write a short message before sending.
contacts.title: Trusted contacts
contacts.intro: People you can reach with one tap when you need help. Stored on this device only and never sent to our servers in plaintext.
contacts.empty: No contacts yet. Add the people you'd want a quick message to reach.
contacts.field.name: Name or label
contacts.err.no_endpoint: Enter a phone number or email.
contacts.toast_save_failed: Couldn't save the contact. Try again.
contacts.privacy_body: The list is sealed with your master key. Locking the vault makes it unreadable until you sign in again. Panic-wipe drops it.
ping.title: Send a ping
ping.intro: Tap a contact to open your phone's text, call, or email app with the message pre-filled. Nothing leaves this device through our servers.
ping.howit.title: How this works
ping.howit.body: We don't send the message. Tapping a contact opens your messaging app with the text already typed, and you choose to press send.
ping.field.location_help: Free text. Anything that helps someone find you.
ping.field.message_placeholder: Add a quick note if you can.
ping.geo_help: Asks your browser for GPS coordinates. Adds them as lat/lon to the location field.
ping.geo_denied: Location access denied. Type an address instead.
ping.privacy: We never see your contact list, your location, or your message. Each ping opens a native app on this device with the body pre-filled.
hotlines.title: Crisis hotlines
resources.quick.title: Find help
settings.reading.help: Larger text and spacing for easier reading.
setup.email.label: Email name
setup.email.bad: Lowercase letters, numbers, dots or dashes (start/end with a letter or number).
notes.title: Notes
notes.lede: Encrypted notes, saved to your vault and editable anytime. Markdown supported.
notes.empty: No notes yet. Tap New note to write one.
library.title: Library
files.annot.placehint: Tap on the page where it should go
files.sigpad.title: Draw your signature
library.publish_confirm: Publish a COPY of this to the Community Library? It will be readable there UNENCRYPTED. Your private vault copy stays encrypted.
